actions.message: Reset IDM, cari candle A baru

extra_instructions:
THRESHOLD OVERRIDE:
- fvg_wait > 10 siklus → force idm_hunt
- bos_guard > 10 siklus → force idm_hunt
- entry_sniper > 5 siklus → force h1_scan
- idm_hunt > 15 siklus → force h1_scan
- reset_count >= 3 → notify owner

AUTHORITY PENUH: edit rules.json, logic_rules.json, prompts, force phase, clear watchlist.
